channel.title: OviyamArt
channel.description: Returning to realistic pencil drawing after 10+ years away. Oviyam means drawing in Tamil. Hands only. No face.

item.title: Can I STILL Draw an Eye After 10 Years? 🤯 #artcomeback #pencilsketch #drawingtutorial
item.description:
Can I STILL Draw an Eye After 10 Years? 🤯 #artcomeback #pencilsketch #drawingtutorial

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Day 3 — an eye of a half face
item.description:
Still improving. Tried HB and B series pencils this time. Back to drawing after years.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Watch this eye into a half face — can I still do this?
item.description:
The progression as a sketch grows from a single detailed eye into a realistic half-face portrait. Capturing depth and shadows.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: The Stubborn Silence of the Ear
item.description:
Documenting the sheer difficulty of rendering a simple ear after years away from the pencil.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: The Stubborn Curve of Realism
item.description:
Exploring the unexpected difficulty of capturing lifelike lips in a realistic pencil sketch, and the persistent challenge it presented.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: New Try: Editing + Sketch… Spot the Mistake #artcomeback #artjourney #art #pencildrawing
item.description:
New Try: Editing + Sketch… Spot the Mistake #artcomeback #artjourney #art #pencildrawing

Watch on YouTube

item.title: The Tremor of Rediscovery
item.description:
Facing the raw challenge of picking up a pencil after years away, and the unexpected resistance it brought.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: No tripod? No problem — DIY art recording hack
item.description:
You don't need fancy equipment to start your art journey. A kitchen spoon and an A4 sheet is enough.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: The Unfamiliar Weight of the Pencil
item.description:
Revisiting the intricate details of an eye with a pencil after a long hiatus, confronting the initial resistance.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Returning after 10 years and completing the eye
item.description:
First sketch after a decade-long break. Documenting the process of picking up the pencil again.

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Returning to Art after 10+ Years #artcomeback #artjourney #drawingforbeginners #pencildrawing
item.description:
Returning to Art after 10+ Years #artcomeback #artjourney #drawingforbeginners #pencildrawing

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Spot the mistake — can you find it?
item.description:
Second sketch after coming back to art. Tried using editing software this time. One deliberate mistake is hidden in the drawing. Can you find it?

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Watch This Eye Into a Half Face! Can I Still Do This! #drawing #art #sketch #pencildrawing #shorts
item.description:
Watch This Eye Into a Half Face! Can I Still Do This! #drawing #art #sketch #pencildrawing #shorts

Watch on YouTube

item.title: Week 1 — Warm-up first, then the real thing
item.description:
Week 1 of returning to pencil sketch drawing after 10 years. Warm-up exercises, a 90-minute eye, and the gap between seeing and doing.

Watch on YouTube
